criteriaCoverage.evidence: rls-isolation.integration.test.ts SET LOCAL ROLE cdp_app_test (verified rolsuper=false rolbypassrls=false) + set_config jwt.claims; reads only WS-A, cannot read/update/insert WS-B (WITH CHECK). service-role-scoping proves scopedQuery isolates in-code on bypass conn. BUT AC1 suite fails intermittently on cold cache (DDL race, not isolation defect).
per-workspace-uniqueness: same external_id in two ws OK; duplicate within ws rejected. UNIQUE(workspace_id,external_id) in 0003.
role-capability-matrix drives full §3A matrix; route-role-enforcement maps failures to 403 per role.
admin-audit.integration: real audit row; platform_only RLS (non-admin 0 rows, admin sees row); handleAdminAccess writes on cross-tenant, no-op otherwise.
workspace-switch-rescope: flipping jwt claim re-scopes a-only->b-only no bleed; authorize denies forged non-membership workspace.

criticalIssues: DATABASE_URL=... pnpm test is NON-DETERMINISTIC and FAILS on cold turbo cache: @cdp/db#test 'tuple concurrently updated' (8/13), failing AC1 RLS suite (sometimes AC5). Reproduced 4x. First green run was turbo replaying 21/27 cached results. Per §16A/§17 a phase is done only when tests are green in CI -> currently red on fresh checkout.
Turbo caches DB-integration outcomes on file hashes, unsound for tests depending on live Postgres state/concurrency; hid the failure during self-verification.
recommendations: Disable turbo caching for DB-integration tests: add cache:false to the test task (or proper inputs incl live DB). Initial green run was a cache replay masking a hard failure.

Make ensureTestAppRole() concurrency-safe OR run db integration files serially (vitest fileParallelism:false / singleThread), OR do the ALTER ROLE/GRANT DDL once in global setup under pg_advisory_xact_lock. Root cause of 'tuple concurrently updated' is parallel ALTER ROLE/GRANT on shared catalog tuples.
Give each integration file a unique fixture namespace; avoid broad DELETE FROM workspaces in beforeAll that races other files.
Add CI step running pnpm test with cleared cache (turbo --force) so the merge gate can't pass on stale cache.
